prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2023年贵州省仍为旧高考理科模式，最低位次约2664→2014→1839，呈持续前移趋势（竞争加剧）；2024年贵州首年新高考，物理类最低位次约698名，2025 年约694名，新高考两年位次高度稳定，2025年基准约694名；该校在贵州省物理类招生计划：2021年76人、2022年73人、2023年73人、2024年43人、2025年38人 ，近年呈缩减趋势；2026年计划大幅增至54人，较2025年扩招约42%，扩招幅度显著，将明显拉低录取门槛。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科 中国大学排名2026年约第14名（2021年第19→2025年第13→2026年第14），稳居全国顶尖工科院校行列，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及师 德师风事件（宫琳事件等），但学校舆情应对较为高效；抖音热度排名第47（较热），短视频平台曝光量处于中上水平，报考关注度不低；未见明显投档断档记录；信息与通信工程A+、控制科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、机械工程A、光学工程A、材料科学与工程A、管理科学与工程A等12个A-及以上学科，工科实力极为突出，与物 理类招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续高热，人工智能方向关注度上升；贵州省2026年考生总数约29.9万人 ，按近年物理类占比约69.7%估算，物理类考生约20.8万人，较2025年20.7万人略有增加，竞争小幅加剧；北京理工大学位于北京市，对贵州省考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在贵州招生占比约1.5%-2%，属正常外省招生比例。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次约694名、2026年物理 类招生计划大幅扩招42%这一核心利好、学校顶尖工科层次及专业热度持续高位、贵州物理类考生小幅增加等因素，扩招效应将显著拉低录取门槛，但学校层次与专业热度形成一 定支撑。预测2026年物理类最低位次约884名，区间783-985名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2023, Guizhou Province still followed the old college entrance examination science model, with the lowest ranking approximately 2664 → 2014 → 1839, showing a continuous forward trend (increased competition); in 2024, Guizhou's first year of the new college entrance examination, the lowest ranking for the Physics Category was approximately 698, and in 2025 approximately 694, with rankings highly stable over the two years of the new exam, with a 2025 baseline of approximately 694; the university's enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Guizhou Province: 76 in 2021, 73 in 2022, 73 in 2023, 43 in 2024, 38 in 2025, showing a recent decreasing trend; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 54, an expansion of about 42% compared to 2025, a notable expansion that will significantly lower the admission threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; in the Soft Science China University Rankings, approximately 14th in 2026 (19th in 2021 → 13th in 2025 → 14th in 2026), firmly among the top engineering institutions nationwide, highly attractive to high-scoring candidates; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving teacher ethics incidents (Gong Lin incident, etc.), but the school's public opinion response has been relatively efficient; Douyin popularity ranking 47th (relatively hot), short video platform exposure at an upper-middle level, with no low application attention; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; Information and Communication Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Mechanical Engineering A, Optical Engineering A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, and 12 other A- and above disciplines, with extremely outstanding engineering strength, highly matching the Physics Category enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular in society, with increasing attention on Artificial Intelligence directions; the total number of candidates in Guizhou Province in 2026 is approximately 299,000, with an estimated Physics Category proportion of about 69.7% in recent years, resulting in approximately 208,000 Physics Category candidates, a slight increase from 207,000 in 2025, leading to a minor intensification of competition; Beijing Institute of Technology is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to candidates from Guizhou Province; the university's enrollment proportion in Guizhou is about 1.5%-2%, which is a normal proportion for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of approximately 694, the core advantage of a significant 42% expansion in the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan, the university's top engineering level and sustained high major popularity, and the slight increase in Physics Category candidates in Guizhou, the expansion effect will significantly lower the admission threshold, but the school level and major popularity provide some support. It is predicted that the lowest ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 884, with a range of 783-985.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 783), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship class types.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2023, under the old Gaokao liberal arts model in Guizhou Province, Beijing Institute of Technology had no enrollment data; in 2024, the first year of the new Gaokao in Guizhou, the minimum ranking for the History Category was approximately 981, and in 2025 it was approximately 926, with a slight upward shift over two years, with a baseline of approximately 926 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan for the History Category in Guizhou: 16 students in 2024, 16 students in 2025, unchanged over two years; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 26 students, an expansion of approximately 62.5% compared to 2025, a very large expansion that will significantly lower the admission threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, approximately 14th, firmly among the top universities in the country, with brand appeal to liberal arts candidates as well. In 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving incidents related to teacher ethics and style; Douyin popularity ranking is 47th (relatively hot), overall attention is moderate to high; no obvious enrollment gaps or breaks have been observed; Business Administration is rated A-, Management Science and Engineering is rated A, indicating strong management disciplines, matching the History Category's Social Science Experimental Class (Management and Economics direction); humanities and social sciences are not traditional strengths of Beijing Institute of Technology, with relatively limited support from discipline evaluations.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major has relatively high social popularity (recommended), management/economics majors show differentiation and wait-and-see; in 2026, the total number of candidates in Guizhou Province is approximately 299,000, with an estimated History Category proportion of about 30.3% in recent years, resulting in approximately 91,000 History Category candidates, roughly flat compared to 90,000 in 2025; Beijing Institute of Technology is located in Beijing, with strong regional appeal to Guizhou liberal arts candidates; the university's enrollment in the History Category in Guizhou is very small, representing exploratory enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of approximately 926, the core factor of a 62.5% expansion in the 2026 History Category enrollment plan, the top-tier brand effect of the university, and the basically stable number of History Category candidates, the expansion effect will significantly lower the admission threshold. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for the History Category in 2026 will be approximately 1263, with a range of 1119-1407.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 1119), you can focus on reaching for Law-related majors in the Humanities and Social Sciences direction.
